story.paragraph1: AlgarveOfficial startede med en enkel idé: premium-opdagelse skal føles kureret, lokal og pålidelig. Vi byggede en fokuseret platform, hvor besøgende trygt kan udforske enestående steder, mens partnere opnår premium-synlighed over for målgrupper med høj købsintention.
story.paragraph2: I dag arbejder vi i skæringspunktet mellem redaktionel kuratering, concierge-standarder og præstationsdrevet vækst. Hvert opslag, destination og kampagne er designet til at beskytte mærkekvaliteten, mens der genereres kvalificeret efterspørgsel.
story.title: Vores Historie

afterPaid.answer: Your claim is saved first, then you continue to secure Stripe checkout. Stripe handles payment securely, while AlgarveOfficial still reviews ownership and premium placement before activating premium visibility.
afterPaid.question: What happens after I choose Verified or Signature?

approvalTime.answer: Most ownership reviews are completed within 2-3 business days. Complex claims, incomplete details or premium placement reviews may take longer.
approvalTime.question: How long does approval take?

cancel.answer: Verified has no long-term contract and can be cancelled anytime. Signature is limited and curated, so our team may review availability and fit before or during activation.
cancel.question: Can I cancel anytime?

claim.answer: Search for your existing AlgarveOfficial listing, confirm it is the right business, choose a tier, then submit ownership details for manual review.
claim.question: How do I claim my business?

cost.answer: A free basic listing is available through the Unverified tier. Verified is €19/month, and Signature is €190/month for qualified premium listings.
cost.question: Is there a cost to be listed?

difference.answer: Unverified gives basic directory and map visibility. Verified adds trust, stronger presentation and priority visibility. Signature adds premium editorial-style eligibility, video and curated placement potential where relevant.
difference.question: What is the difference between Unverified, Verified and Signature?

guarantees.answer: No. AlgarveOfficial sells visibility, credibility and qualified discovery. We do not sell guaranteed bookings, traffic or revenue.
guarantees.question: Does AlgarveOfficial guarantee bookings or traffic?

payBeforeApproval.answer: Paid tier checkout can happen after the claim is saved, but payment does not bypass review. Premium visibility remains subject to ownership approval, quality standards, relevance and availability.
payBeforeApproval.question: Do I pay before approval?

signatureAvailable.answer: No. Signature is limited and subject to quality standards, relevance, imagery, category fit, location, contact quality and available curated placement inventory.
signatureAvailable.question: Is Signature available to every business?

upgrade.answer: Yes. You can start with a free basic listing and upgrade later when your business is ready for stronger credibility and visibility.
upgrade.question: Can I upgrade later?
